name: Sushi Bar "Moebius"
short_description: Aim for the Legendary Otoro! Merge, grow, and satisfy your customers in this revolving Sushi puzzle!
detailed_description:
Welcome to a Sushi shop where the laws of physics are a little... unique. As the Sushi chef, your job is to drop Sushi into the box one after another. Merge identical toppings to transform them into even more luxurious pieces of Sushi!

Your creations will travel down the conveyor belt to the waiting customers. Trust your intuition and craft the ultimate "Otoro"!

Unpredictable Sushi Drama! The Sushi in this shop moves with its own distinct physics. Bouncing when dropped or sliding into tiny gaps—every move creates unpredictable drama. The satisfaction of a perfect merge is "Otoro-level" greatness!

From the Box to the Belt! It’s not just about matching. Once your Sushi evolves, it automatically flows onto the conveyor belt to be served to the customers at the counter. Experience the thrill of solving puzzles while running a bustling Sushi shop! It’s the perfect system for both Sushi lovers and puzzle fans.

Keep the Customers Full! As customers eat your Sushi, their satisfaction increases. Once they are full, they’ll make way for the next hungry guest. Aim for a high score by efficiently serving high-grade (high-score) Sushi!

The controls are simple—anyone can start playing immediately. Just aim and drop!

  • Aim and Drop: Use the A/D keys to choose where to drop the sushi, and press the Space key to drop it.

  • Merge Identical Sushi: When two of the same Sushi touch (e.g., a "Kappa-maki" and another "Kappa-maki"), they’ll pop and evolve into the next stage!

  • Don't Let the Box Overflow: If the Sushi piles up and crosses the line at the top of the box, it’s Game Over (Shop Closed!).

  • Aim for Combos: The "pop" from an evolution creates a physical impact that moves nearby Sushi. Arrange them wisely to trigger a chain reaction of evolutions!

Use the mouse when the sushi cursor appears.

・Keybord

A/D Move

Q/E Rotation

Space Make a drop in sushi

Esc Option

・Mouse (auxiliary to keyboard)

Scroll Rotation

Left Make a drop in sushi

Watch your Sushi grow from humble beginnings to a grand feast. As a Sushi chef, can you reach the legendary "Otoro"?

  • Kappa-maki (Cucumber Roll - Start here!)

  • Tamago (Egg)

  • Tekka-maki (Tuna Roll)

  • Aji (Horse Mackerel)

  • Tako (Octopus)

  • Anago (Conger Eel)

  • Salmon

  • Ikura (Salmon Roe)

  • Ebi (Shrimp)

  • Tai (Sea Bream)

  • Uni (Sea Urchin)

  • Otoro (Fatty Tuna - The Ultimate Masterpiece!)
